summary: Smart Match Phase 1 testing complete. All 14/14 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Dashboard 'Top Matches' card shows 3 schools with match scores, chips, 'Add to Pipeline' CTA, and 'Upgrade for more' badge. Schools page 'Recommended for You' section shows 3 smart match cards with scores, chips, and 'Unlock 953+ matches' button. Navigation to /schools/{domain} works correctly. Add to Pipeline returns 403 for Emma (expected - she has 12 schools on 5-school basic plan).

VERIFIED: Recommendations sorted by match_score descending
VERIFIED: Response includes chips array (max 3 reason strings)
VERIFIED: in_pipeline field correctly shows pipeline status
VERIFIED: Auth enforcement - requires authentication (401 without)
